subcodes.first_line: O Salamander of the divine burning flame! Praise be to God that the fragrances of the Covenant have perfumed all horizons, and the lights of the Testament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر نار موقده الهیه الحمد لله نفحات میثاق آفاق را معطر نموده و انوار عهد
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
